relationships.context: Provides guidance on billing, invoicing strategy, and financial operations
Generates manual payment links from Stripe dashboard for ad hoc billing
Recommends manual billing until 25-30 paying customers
At ~5 customers, do not over-optimize or automate
Advises against using Stripe Invoicing due to higher fee cut
Recommends QuickBooks over Stripe Invoicing if true invoicing is needed
Worried about getting invoicing wrong and losing margin
Downsized engineering team, operating lean with mature product
Both principles support staying manual and lean at early revenue stage
